roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:GEORGEBORGES/987,2/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,//NTW60/LDPX:08-31-20/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BEPLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BEFITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/SA4:AREA BOUNDED BY GEARY (NORTH), LARKIN (WEST), MARKET (SOUTH) AND JONES(EAST), S,F, CA/SAORD/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET/INTC/MO PC 1385:PLEA TO ANOTHER CHARGE/CTORD:GPS MONITORING IS TERMINATED UPON RETURN OF ALL EQUIPMENT TO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/
